message:
style(embed): rustfmt pass on API embedding system

Apply consistent formatting across the API embedding pipeline:

- api_embedder.rs: reorder imports alphabetically (Cx before bytes),
  collapse single-line poll_fn call, reformat method chain in
  Embedder::embed to standard .ok_or_else().map() style
- api_provider.rs: expand authorization header tuple for line length,
  collapse .get().and_then().ok_or_else() chain, inline index
  extraction chain onto single line
- auto_detect.rs: collapse or_else chain onto single line, reduce
  indentation of match arms in detect_api_embedder() by removing
  unnecessary nesting from provider assignment
- searcher.rs: expand long match arm in embedder_tier_for_stage to
  multi-line block for line-length compliance

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
